untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'recent high' lookback over 60 days to define 10-15% weakness threshold. No Donchian or highest-high indicator over 60-period available. Used price_pos_20 as approximation for weakness detection, but this does not precisely capture the 60-day lookback requirement. ADX or trend-strength confirmation would improve regime detection but is not explicitly parameterized in signal.
translation_notes: TREND-FOLLOWING ENTRY: price > sma_50 AND rsi_14 > 50. COUNTERTREND ENTRY: price < sma_50 (weakness proxy via price_pos_20 < 0.15 for bottom-quintile positioning) AND vol_ratio_20 > 1.2 for liquidity. TREND EXIT: close crosses below sma_50 OR rsi_14 < 40. COUNTERTREND EXIT: returns > 6% profit target OR close crosses above sma_10 (10-day MA return). Direction set CONTEXT_DEPENDENT to capture both long (trending) and short (countertrend) logic. Regime targets set to TRENDING_UP, TRENDING_DOWN, RANGING per signal specification.
